{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":715947,"duration_api_ms":693643,"num_turns":91,"result":"Step 2 완료 (커밋 `9fa0701`). **산출물** - fixture: `packages/core/tests/fixtures/vault-mixed/note-with-alias.md`(public, aliases `old-name`/`previous-title`), `private-with-alias.md`(private, alias `secret-old` + canary A); README/매니페스트 갱신. - 통합 테스트: `packages/core/tests/integration/aliasFixture.test.ts` (3건) — public alias가 redirect로 노출되고, private alias `secret-old`는 0회, canary A가 aliasRedirects/HTML/frontmatter/warnings 어디에도 누출 안 됨. - 라우트: `apps/blog/src/pages/[...slug].astro`가 `kind` discriminator로 분기 — alias-redirect 분기는 `` + redirect 절대 URL의 `` + `여기` 외 본문 출력 없음. `getStaticPaths`에 충돌 조기 검증 추가. - audit: `alias-redirect-broken-target`, `alias-redirect-body-leak` 두 규칙 + `publicTitles` 입력 추가. 본문 leak 검사는 `
` 텍스트만 보므로 anchor href 안의 슬러그는 false-positive 안 됨. - 단위 테스트: `packages/cli/tests/audit/checks.test.ts` 6건 추가(broken target, slug/index.html · flat .html 매칭, body leak, href false-positive 회피, non-redirect HTML 무시). **AC 결과**: `pnpm -r typecheck`, `pnpm lint`, `pnpm test` (413/413 통과). `index.json` step 2 → completed.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"1bd80a88-b1e6-4523-a322-9461f397a068","total_cost_usd":7.080993249999999,"usage":{"input_tokens":100,"cache_creation_input_tokens":197915,"cache_read_input_tokens":9500543,"output_tokens":43180,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":197915,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":622,"cache_read_input_tokens":162990,"cache_creation_input_tokens":759,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":759},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001":{"inputTokens":13678,"outputTokens":15,"cacheReadInputTokens":0,"cacheCreationInputTokens":0,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.013753,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000},"claude-opus-4-7[1m]":{"inputTokens":100,"outputTokens":43180,"cacheReadInputTokens":9500543,"cacheCreationInputTokens":197915,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":7.067240249999999,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[{"tool_name":"Bash","tool_use_id":"toolu_01UsVwUGLc6is3njqn6TduVc","tool_input":{"command":"ls /home/shine/projects/obsidian_blog/packages/core/tests/fixtures/vault-mixed/private/","description":"List private folder"}}],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"cf11b6a6-8bac-4ba5-ba5e-3a2340c120b3"}
